name: chauhan-mukesh/studio-todo-bundle
description: A production-grade todo management bundle for Pimcore 12 with Studio UI integration

suggest.symfony/workflow: ^6.4 || ^7.0: Native Symfony state machine support; the bundle includes a built-in fallback when not configured
suggest.symfony/mercure-bundle: Required for real-time todo updates via Mercure SSE
suggest.pimcore/studio-ui-bundle: Required for Pimcore Studio UI widget integration
